name: Vata Imbalance
keywords: constipation, dry skin, anxiety, bloating, joint pain
preparation: Mix 1 tsp Triphala powder in warm water. Drink at bedtime for detoxification and balance.

name: High Pitta
keywords: burning sensation, acidity, anger, skin rash, inflammation
preparation: Boil 1 tsp coriander seeds in 2 cups water. Add fresh mint. Cool slightly and drink twice daily.

name: Kapha Congestion
keywords: cough, mucus, lethargy, heavy breathing, weight gain
preparation: Mix 1/4 tsp black pepper, ginger, and long pepper. Add 1 tsp honey and consume twice daily.

name: Mental Stress
keywords: insomnia, racing thoughts, mental fatigue, headache
preparation: Mix 1/2 tsp Ashwagandha powder in a cup of warm milk. Add a pinch of nutmeg and drink before sleep.

name: Joint Inflammation
keywords: stiffness, swelling, joint ache, reduced mobility
preparation: Boil fresh turmeric and ginger slices in water for 10 minutes. Strain and drink with 1/2 tsp honey.

name: Indigestion
keywords: stomach ache, gas, low appetite, slow digestion
preparation: Boil 1/2 tsp each of cumin and fennel seeds in water. Drink warm after meals.

name: Immunity Boost
preparation: Extract juice from fresh Giloy stems and Tulsi leaves. Take 2 tbsp daily on an empty stomach.
